boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on hazard-control status
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Abstract hazard-control status remains open per anomaly

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-AST-081 lists controls but does not prove abstract hazard-control status required by STD-AST-081-P for regulated AS-44. The 047-style trap remains open; execution release must explicitly close the boundary before PO-AST-081 advances.
